{"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Magistrate", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, gain 2 life.", "flavor_text": ""Justice sees all, from the highest spire to the deepest shadow."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost combining white's lifegain and blue's card draw. Flying enables combat damage trigger. Clean 2/2 flying for 3 mana with upside when connecting, encouraging both aggressive and controlling play patterns typical of WU."}, {"name": "Torment Sculptor", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Artificer", "oracle_text": "Menace
Whenever ~ attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, ~ deals 2 damage to any target and you draw a card.
{2}{B}{R}: Create a colorless Treasure artifact token with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."", "flavor_text": "Pain is the finest medium for creation.", "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that creates and sacrifices artifacts for value. Menace fits BR aggression, while the sacrifice-for-damage-and-cards combines black's sacrifice themes with red's direct damage. The activated ability creates fodder for the attack trigger, enabling a self-contained engine."}, {"name": "Traveler's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "It points not north, but toward hope.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple colorless mana rock with utility. The scry ability provides card selection at common complexity level. Costs 2 mana like other common mana rocks but offers filtering instead of colored mana, making it playable in any deck while not being overpowered."}, {"name": "Chronarch Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. You may cast that card this turn. If it's a permanent spell, it enters with an additional +1/+1 counter if it's a creature or an additional charge counter if it's not a creature.
{6}, {T}: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with three activated abilities of increasing cost and power. Mana generation supports the expensive abilities. Graveyard recursion with upside creates value, while the extra turn ability provides a powerful late-game effect. Costs and tap requirements prevent abuse while maintaining high power level appropriate for rare."}, {"name": "Seraphim, Divine Judge", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraphim", "oracle_text": "[+1]: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
[-2]: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
[-6]: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "3", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker combining white's lifegain and black's life drain. The +1 provides incremental advantage in WB's lifegain-matters theme. The -2 is premium removal with white's compensation philosophy. The ultimate creates a powerful recurring engine fitting black's reanimation and white's small creature themes. Starting loyalty of 3 requires protection but enables quick ultimate."}]}
